s: Holos: Mobile-first Fediverse client with your own ActivityPub identity
d:
Holos is a mobile-first Fediverse client that gives you your own ActivityPub identity directly on your phone. Unlike traditional Mastodon apps that require an account on a server, Holos runs a full ActivityPub server on your device.

Key Features:

- Your Own ActivityPub Server
  - Full ActivityPub server running on your phone
  - Your data stored locally on your device
  - Relay server provides a stable address for federation

- Full Fediverse Compatibility
  - Follow and interact with users on Mastodon, Pleroma, Misskey, Pixelfed, and more
  - Full ActivityPub support: posts, likes, boosts, replies, quotes, and mentions
  - Direct messages with real-time delivery

- Flexible Timeline Views
  - Switch between All, Media only, Videos only, or Text only
  - Quickly adapt your feed to your current mood
  - Filter content the way you want

- Mobile-First Design
  - Built from the ground up for mobile
  - Works offline with automatic sync when reconnected
  - Battery-efficient with smart background sync

- Privacy Focused
  - Your posts and messages stored locally in SQLite
  - All traffic proxied through relay for IP privacy
  - RSA keys generated on-device, private key never leaves your phone

- Real-Time Sync
  - WebSocket connection for instant notifications
  - Activity queue with priority-based delivery
  - Automatic catch-up after offline periods
